ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the county belongs to */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the county center */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the county center */,
  "area_sqmi" REAL /* Total area of the county in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "dem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the demographic data belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "pop_sqmi" REAL /* Population density of the county (people per square mile) */,
  "white" REAL /* Percentage of white population */,
  "black" REAL /* Percentage of black population */,
  "hispanic" REAL /* Percentage of hispanic population */,
  "other_race" REAL /* Percentage of other racial populations */,
  "pct_male" REAL /* Percentage of male population */,
  "pct_female" REAL /* Percentage of female population */,
  "med_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "time_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time period the demographic data belongs to */,
  "total_households" INTEGER /* Total number of households in the county */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median household income */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population living below the poverty line */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is unemployed */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Average education level of the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_time_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_id") REFERENCES time_periods ("time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_stats" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health statistics record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the health statistics belong to */,
  "all_rate" REAL /* All rate (health statistic) */,
  "mddo_rate" REAL /* MDDO rate (health statistic) */,
  "nppa_rate" REAL /* NPPA rate (health statistic) */,
  "count_all" INTEGER /* Count of all health statistic */,
  "mddo_count" INTEGER /* Count of MDDO health statistic */,
  "nppa_count" INTEGER /* Count of NPPA health statistic */,
  "time_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time period the health statistics belong to */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy in the county */,
  "infant_mortality_rate" REAL /* Rate of infant mortality */,
  "obesity_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is obese */,
  "smoking_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that smokes */,
  "alcohol_consumption" REAL /* Average alcohol consumption per capita */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_stats_time_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_id") REFERENCES time_periods ("time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_stats_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_periods" (
  "time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time period */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year(s) the data was collected */,
  "pct_change_all" REAL /* Percentage change in all rate */,
  "pct_change_mddo" REAL /* Percentage change in MDDO rate */,
  "pct_change_nppa" REAL /* Percentage change in NPPA rate */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the time period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the time period */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the time period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the dataset version belongs to */,
  "time_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time period the dataset version belongs to */,
  "dem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data the dataset version belongs to */,
  "health_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health statistics the dataset version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dataset version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dataset version was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset version (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dem_id FOREIGN KEY ("dem_id") REFERENCES demographics ("dem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_time_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_id") REFERENCES time_periods ("time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_health_id FOREIGN KEY ("health_id") REFERENCES health_stats ("health_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has administrative privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
